steps.title: Compare the two views
steps.content: Text 1 treats flat characters as part of Asimov's weak style. Text 2 argues that limited characterization can be intentional and central to Asimov's thematic aim of showing history on a vast timescale.

steps.title: Reject misread responses
steps.content: Choice A blames a lack of historical understanding, which Text 2 does not do. Choice B makes a book-specific distinction Text 2 never claims. Choice D says fewer ideas would help, the opposite of Text 2's defense. The answer is C.
